title: LiteLLM Python Package With 95 Million Downloads Compromised by TeamPCP Hackers

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - LiteLLM Python Package With 95 Million Downloads Compromised
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/27
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*checkmarx.zone*'
            - '*models.litellm.cloud*'
            - '*sysmon.service*'
            - '*tpcp.tar.gz*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
